phase_3.text: (TDD mode). The task requires creating `tests/unit/test_transcript.py` with comprehensive tests. The

summary: 27 tests passed, 99.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.evidence: Created tests/unit/test_transcript.py with 6 test classes: TestTranscriptSegment, TestTranscriptResult, TestTranscriptClient, TestListTranscripts, TestExceptionHierarchy, TestCancelledErrorHandling. Also created tests/unit/__init__.py for Python package structure.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Happy path: successful transcript fetch with correct result structure
completion_promises.evidence: TestTranscriptClient.test_get_transcript_success verifies happy path: mocks api.fetch(), asserts video_id, language, language_code, is_auto_generated, total_segments, and full_text fields are correct.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Language fallback: auto-generated fallback when manual not found
completion_promises.evidence: TestTranscriptClient.test_get_transcript_fallback_to_auto_generated tests auto-generated fallback. Additional tests: test_get_transcript_fallback_to_english (English variant fallback) and test_get_transcript_fallback_to_first_available (first available fallback).

Three dedicated tests: test_get_transcript_disabled_raises (TranscriptsDisabledError), test_get_transcript_video_unavailable_raises (VideoUnavailableError), test_get_transcript_no_transcripts_raises (NoTranscriptFoundError). Exception hierarchy verified in TestExceptionHierarchy class.

TestTranscriptClient.test_build_result_calculates_totals verifies total_segments=3, total_duration_seconds=7.5 (2.5+3.0+2.0), full_text='Hello world This is a test Thank you'. Edge cases covered: test_build_result_empty_snippets and test_build_result_single_segment.
TestTranscriptSegment.test_segment_creation verifies start, duration, text fields. Additional tests: test_segment_equality and test_segment_inequality for dataclass behavior.

TestListTranscripts.test_list_transcripts_success verifies correct format with language, language_code, is_generated fields. Edge cases: test_list_transcripts_disabled_returns_empty, test_list_transcripts_video_unavailable_returns_empty, test_list_transcripts_empty_list.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All tests pass with pytest tests/unit/test_transcript.py -v
completion_promises.evidence: Ran pytest tests/unit/test_transcript.py -v: 27 passed in 0.08s. Zero failures.
Coverage: 99% (92 statements, 1 miss) for src/services/transcript_client.py. Well above the >80% threshold.
